hooks.commandWindows: if (Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { node "$env:PLUGIN_ROOT\scripts\voltflow.mjs" hook } else { Write-Error 'VoltFlow requires Node.js 20 or newer'; exit 1 }
